search query: The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.
embedding query: actions: limit action: limit object: our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns actor: The right to object modal: Permissive text: The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.

top matches.text: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes, the personal data shall no longer be processed for such purposes.
top matches.embedding text: actions: no action: no object: longer be processed for such purposes. actor: the personal data modal: Mandatory condition: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes text: Where the data subject objects to processing for direct marketing purposes, the personal data shall no longer be processed for such purposes.

top matches.text: Where personal data are processed for direct marketing purposes, the data subject shall have the right to object at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her for such marketing, which includes profiling to the extent that it is related to such direct marketing.
top matches.embedding text: actions: have action: have object: the right to object at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her for such marketing, which includes profiling to the extent that it is related to such direct marketing. actor: the data subject modal: Mandatory temporal: at any time condition: Where personal data are processed for direct marketing purposes text: Where personal data are processed for direct marketing purposes, the data subject shall have the right to object at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her for such marketing, which includes profiling to the extent that it is related to such direct marketing.

top matches.text: The data subject shall have the right to object, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her which is based on point (e) or (f) of Article 6(1), including profiling based on those provisions.
top matches.embedding text: actions: have action: have object: the right to object, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her which is based on point (e) or (f) of Article 6(1), including profiling based on those provisions. actor: The data subject modal: Mandatory temporal: at any time condition: grounds relating to his or her particular situation text: The data subject shall have the right to object, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, at any time to processing of personal data concerning him or her which is based on point (e) or (f) of Article 6(1), including profiling based on those provisions.

top matches.text: That right shall not apply to processing necessary for the performance of a task carried out in the public interest or in the exercise of official authority vested in the controller.

top matches.text: At the latest at the time of the first communication with the data subject, the right referred to in paragraphs 1 and 2 shall be explicitly brought to the attention of the data subject and shall be presented clearly and separately from any other information.

top matches.text: Where personal data are processed for scientific or historical research purposes or statistical purposes pursuant to Article 89(1), the data subject, on grounds relating to his or her particular situation, shall have the right to object to processing of personal data concerning him or her, unless the processing is necessary for the performance of a task carried out for reasons of public interest.
